evals.prompt: Create a new skill for processing PDF forms that extracts field information and fills them automatically
evals.expected_output: A complete skill directory with SKILL.md, scripts for PDF processing, and evals/evals.json with test cases
expectations: Skill directory created with proper structure (SKILL.md, scripts/, references/)
SKILL.md contains clear workflow instructions for PDF form processing
Scripts included for deterministic operations (extract fields, fill forms)
evals/evals.json created with 3-5 test prompts
Skill description includes both what it does AND when to trigger

evals.prompt: Improve my existing email skill to handle attachments better
evals.expected_output: Updated skill with improved attachment handling, new test cases, and benchmark results
expectations: Skill updated with attachment handling workflow
New eval prompts added for attachment scenarios
Benchmark run comparing old vs new version
Results reviewed with eval-viewer

evals.prompt: Create evals for my bigquery skill to test query generation accuracy
evals.expected_output: evals/evals.json with 10-15 test prompts covering different query types
expectations: evals/evals.json created with proper schema
Test prompts cover explicit, implicit, and contextual triggers
Each eval has clear expectations/assertions
Includes negative controls (prompts that should NOT trigger)

evals.prompt: Run evaluations on my docx skill and show me the results
evals.expected_output: Benchmark results with pass rates, timing data, and viewer URL
expectations: With-skill and baseline runs executed
Grading completed for all expectations
benchmark.json generated with aggregated results
eval-viewer launched or static HTML generated

evals.prompt: Optimize my skill's description to trigger more accurately
evals.expected_output: Improved skill description with better trigger rate
expectations: Current trigger rate measured with run_eval.py
Description rewritten to be more 'pushy' about triggers
New trigger rate measured and compared
Improvement documented

evals.prompt: Write a Python script for my skill that validates output format
evals.expected_output: Tested Python script in skills/scripts/ directory
expectations: Script created in scripts/ directory
Script is executable and tested
Script validates output format deterministically
Script integrated into skill workflow

evals.prompt: Add reference documentation to my skill for API endpoints
evals.expected_output: API reference documentation in skills/reference/ directory
expectations: Reference file created in references/ directory
Documentation includes authentication, endpoints, examples
SKILL.md updated to reference the new file
Progressive disclosure pattern followed

evals.prompt: Create a skill for generating CEO briefing reports from weekly data
evals.expected_output: Complete CEO briefing skill with intelligence-gathering workflow
expectations: Skill created with proper structure
Workflow includes data gathering from multiple sources
Report template defined with executive summary, key findings, recommendations
Evals created to test report quality
